name: Mercer Park Brand Acquisition Corp.
summary: Mercer Park Brand Acquisition Corp. does not have significant operations. It intends to effect an acquisition of one or more businesses or assets by way of a merger, amalgamation, arrangement, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization, or any other similar business combination involving the Corporation in cannabis and/or cannabis-adjacent industries. The company was incorporated in 2019 and is headquartered in New York, New York.
